title: Beehiiv vs Campaign Monitor (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Campaign Monitor. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your needs.
h1: Beehiiv vs Campaign Monitor: Detailed Feature & Price Comparison
intro: Beehiiv and Campaign Monitor serve different segments of the email marketing market. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter creators with growth-oriented features, while Campaign Monitor targets agencies managing multiple client brands. This comparison helps you choose the right platform based on your specific use case and budget.

comparison_table.tool_a: Freemium (Free up to 2,500 subscribers, paid from $39/month)
comparison_table.tool_b: Paid only (starts at $11/month, no free tier)
Agencies and teams managing multiple brands

comparison_table.tool_a: Newsletter monetization, ad network, referral program, analytics
comparison_table.tool_b: Multi-brand management, journey designer, transactional email, smart segments

choose_a_if: You're a newsletter creator or independent publisher looking to monetize your audience
You want to start free and scale gradually without upfront costs
You prioritize growth-focused features like referral programs and built-in ad networks
choose_b_if: You manage email campaigns for multiple clients or brands simultaneously
You need advanced automation with journey designer and transactional email capabilities
You require professional email templates and multi-brand management features

faq.q: Is Beehiiv better than Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Beehiiv is better for individual newsletter creators and publishers seeking monetization features, while Campaign Monitor is superior for agencies managing multiple client accounts. Beehiiv has higher user ratings overall, but Campaign Monitor offers more robust enterprise features.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Beehiiv is cheaper initially because it offers a free tier supporting up to 2,500 subscribers at no cost. Campaign Monitor starts at $11/month with no free option. However, once you exceed Beehiiv's free limits, pricing becomes competitive between the two platforms.

faq.q: Can I switch from Campaign Monitor to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list imports and migrations. However, you'll need to manually recreate automated workflows and custom segments, as they use different automation architectures. Campaign Monitor's journey designer is more complex than Beehiiv's, so migration may require workflow redesign.
